product.name: ArGiyim Dura
product.categorySourceGroup: Woven PA.6.6 fabrics for police uniforms, motorcyclists, bomb disposal suits and technical military applications.
product.titleDescriptor: 50% Pa6.6 50% Cotton woven fabric for Police and Gendarme wear
product.specLine: 245 g/m², 50% Pa 6.6 50% Cotton, Water Repellent, Antibacterial Woven Fabric
descriptions: ArGiyim Dura is 50% polyamide 6.6 50% Cotton woven fabric for military, police and gendarme wear. It is suitable for mobile motobikers police wear. The Pa6.6 high tenacity fibers gives for extra protection for polices. The front side of the fabric is polyamide 6.6 and the back side is cotton. The fabric has water and oil repellent function.
It's used mostly for application which requires ultra durability.
The antibacterial funtion is very usefull to eliminate all kind of odor formation during work.
50% Pa6.6 50% Cotton woven fabric for Police and Gendarme wear
245 g/m², 50% Pa 6.6 50% Cotton, Water Repellent, Antibacterial Woven Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>1500N; Weft>1000N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>80N; Weft>40N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants | EN ISO 14362-1
Allergenic Dyestuffs | Not Detected | EN ISO 14362-1

acceptedMatches.rationale: Explicitly stated for military, police and gendarme wear, directly matching the military/uniformed-services application.

evidence: descriptions: 'It is suitable for mobile motobikers police wear'
acceptedMatches.rationale: Explicitly stated as suitable for motorcyclist police wear, directly supporting motorcycle apparel classification.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Explicit high-visibility property with EN ISO 20471 certification directly supports hi-vis application.

evidence: descriptions: 'It is suitable for mobile motobikers police wear'
secondary.rationale: Explicit statement of use for police motorbike riders independently supports motorcycle apparel as a secondary application.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Hi-vis certification (EN ISO 20471) is a property present, but the fabric's primary framed use is police/military/motorbike wear, not a certified warning garment as the central purpose.
Antibacterial property alone does not indicate medical/healthcare end use; no explicit medical context stated.
More specific military/police use is explicitly stated, superseding generic workwear classification.
